title: Ebola outbreak worries WHO over 'scale and speed': What to know
summary_full: A severe Ebola outbreak, caused by the rare Bundibugyo virus, has claimed 130 lives with over 500 suspected cases.  The World Health Organization warns of high risk to neighboring nations, stressing human-to-human transmission via bodily fluids and contact with infected animals.  Emergency response systems are being activated to combat the escalating crisis.
